title: Help Documentation
description: Elizabeth User Guide and Feature Reference

copyButton.title: Copy Button
copyButton.description: Copy selected messages to the clipboard. You can configure whether to include metadata (timestamp and message number) in Settings.

downloadButton.title: Download Button
downloadButton.description: Export selected messages as a Markdown file to your local machine. You can configure whether to include metadata in Settings.

saveButton.title: Save Button
saveButton.description: Save all unsaved changes to the server. The button highlights when there are unsaved messages (new, edited, or deleted).

deleteButton.title: Delete Button
deleteButton.description: Mark selected messages for deletion. Messages are only actually deleted after clicking the save button. You can configure whether to show a message delete confirmation dialog in Settings.

settingsButton.title: Settings Button
settingsButton.description: Open the system settings dialog to configure application behavior and preferences.

expiry.title: Expiry Time
expiry.description: Set the room's expiry time. Room content will be cleared and reset upon expiry. Available durations are defined by the server deployment configuration.

password.title: Room Password
password.description: Set password protection for the room. When enabled, a password is required to access the room.

maxViews.title: Max Views
maxViews.description: Set the maximum number of visits for the room. Room content will be cleared and reset once the limit is reached.

permissions.title: Room Permissions
permissions.description: Set the current user's permissions for the room:

edit.label: Edit
edit.description: Upload and modify content (requires Preview permission)

share.label: Share
share.description: Publicly share the room (requires Preview permission)

delete.label: Delete
delete.description: Delete room content (requires Preview and Edit permissions)

shareLink.title: Share Link
shareLink.description: When the room has share permission, it can be accessed directly via the room name (e.g., http://domain.com/room_name). Without share permission, a unique link with a UUID is generated (e.g., http://domain.com/room_name_uuid).

qrcode.title: QR Code
qrcode.description: Click the "Get Link" button to view the room's share link and QR code. You can download the QR code image or copy the link to share with others.

editMessage.title: Edit Message
editMessage.description: Click the edit button on a message bubble to edit it. While editing, the message shows an "Editing" badge and the editor displays an edit prompt. After editing, click the send button and the message will be marked as "Edited". You need to click the save button to save it to the server.

copyMessage.title: Copy Message
copyMessage.description: Click the copy button on a message bubble to copy a single message. Whether the copied content includes metadata (timestamp and message number) depends on the "Include metadata when copying" setting.

deleteMessage.title: Delete Message
deleteMessage.description: Click the delete button on a message bubble to mark it for deletion. Deleted messages will show a strikethrough effect. Messages are only actually deleted after clicking the save button in the top toolbar. Click the undo button to cancel the deletion.

saveChanges.title: Save Changes
saveChanges.description: All message operations (create, edit, delete) require clicking the save button in the top toolbar to persist to the server. The save button highlights when there are unsaved changes.
